## SourcePack PR checklist

- [ ] Tests/checks run are listed in the PR description.
- [ ] SourcePack gate verdict is listed: PASS / WARN / FAIL / not run.
- [ ] Reason codes are listed if SourcePack reported WARN or FAIL.
- [ ] SourcePack report path is listed if a report was produced.
- [ ] I confirm this PR does not create or refresh trusted `.sourcepack/baseline/` state in CI.
